sections.heading: What we collect
sections.body: Information you provide via our forms — name, email, phone, and the message you send. We do not collect medical history unless you choose to share it with us.

sections.heading: How we use it
sections.body: To respond to your enquiry. We do not sell or share your information with third parties for marketing.

sections.heading: Storage
sections.body: Form submissions arrive in our team email inbox. They are retained for as long as needed to follow up with you, and deleted on request.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: Email us at the address in our footer to request a copy of, or deletion of, any information you have shared.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: For any privacy question, write to us at the email in the site footer.

sections.heading: About this site
sections.body: This website is published by SS Kidney Care for general information about the hospital and the services we offer.

sections.heading: No medical advice
sections.body: Content here is informational. It does not replace consultation with a qualified clinician. Always confirm with a doctor before acting on anything you read.

sections.heading: Accuracy
sections.body: We try to keep everything accurate and up to date. Where information may be out of date, we mention it.

sections.heading: External links
sections.body: Where we link to other sites, we don't control their content or claims.

disclaimer.title: Medical disclaimer
disclaimer.body: The information on this website is provided for general awareness about kidney health and the services we offer. It is not a substitute for medical advice from a qualified clinician. Treatment plans depend on individual factors only your nephrologist can assess. If you believe you are experiencing a medical emergency, please call our 24×7 line or your local emergency number immediately.
